series_metadata.series_description: Payment requests, eligibility queries, eligibility rosters, applications and correspondence from parents, students, high school guidance counselors and financial aid officers related to this program.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: correspondence from students, parents and institutions and copies of checks from institutions in office . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released, . ; Electronic: student applications applied through FAFSA and downloaded from Federal processing website and payment information . audit by Auditor of State is completed and released
